data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Keeps user choices simple to enhance decision-making speed.
data.technical_spec: Minimalistic design, Intuitive navigation, Focused content.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Design elements ensuring ease of interactibility.
data.technical_spec: Button size optimization, Responsive click areas, Industrial placements.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Aligns related items together for better visual grouping.
data.technical_spec: Grid layouts, Spatial proximity, White spaces.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Chunks information to prevent overwhelming users.
data.technical_spec: Segmented content, Content hierarchy, Chunked data presentation.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Utilizes familiar design patterns by users.
data.technical_spec: Consistent UI elements, Familiar user journeys, Common design standards.
